backend/main.mo: Motoko backend defining EI assessment data types, scoring logic, submission comparison, and user profile structure.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping production deployment and readiness features to involved files, components, and tests.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Prewritten summaries of key frontend files including components, hooks, utilities, and deployment docs.
frontend/DEPLOYMENT_PRODUCTION.md: Guide detailing prerequisites, configuration, and steps for deploying the app to IC mainnet.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind-based global styles defining color system variables and light/dark theme support.
frontend/index.html: Root HTML file loading the React app via main.tsx.
Checklist for validating production readiness, including build checks, canister status, auth flow, assessment, and admin features.
frontend/SMOKE_TEST_PRODUCTION.md: Smoke test guide outlining post-deployment verification steps for authentication and basic functionality.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Main React app configuring routing, authentication state, profile setup modal, layout, and theme provider.
frontend/src/components/assessment/Asses: Renders a 50‑question EI assessment form, tracks answers, validates completeness, and submits results to the backend.
frontend/src/components/assessment/Liker: Displays a single statement with 1–5 rating buttons and notifies the parent when a value is selected.
frontend/src/components/auth/ProfileSetu: Modal prompting the user for their name and saving it to their profile using a mutation hook.
frontend/src/components/layout/AppLayout: Provides the main app layout with navigation, authentication handling, and role‑based admin links.
frontend/src/components/results/ResultsT: Shows EI competency scores with interpreted categories and a visual breakdown of results.
frontend/src/content/eiStatements.ts: Exports the 50 EI survey statements along with competency mappings and labels.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Creates and manages an authenticated or anonymous backend actor, refreshing dependent queries when it changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides React context and hooks for managing Internet Identity authentication, including login, logout, and identity state handling.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines React Query hooks for fetching and mutating user profiles, submissions, assessments, and admin-related actions through an actor.
frontend/src/index.css: Sets up Tailwind layers and defines light/dark CSS variables for theme colors and global styles.
frontend/src/lib/eiInterpretation.ts: Maps EI score totals to categories and provides label and color helpers for displaying category results.
frontend/src/lib/eiScoring.ts: Calculates EI competency scores from answers and converts answer arrays into backend-compatible formats.
frontend/src/lib/exporters.ts: Exports submissions as JSON or CSV files, including answers and interpreted competency results.
frontend/src/lib/utils.ts: Provides a utility function to merge and normalize class names using clsx and tailwind-merge.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Bootstraps the React app with React Query and Internet Identity providers and renders the root component.
frontend/src/pages/AdminSurveyorsPage.ts: Admin page allowing authorized users to assign or revoke surveyor access, with authentication and permission checks.
frontend/src/pages/AssessmentPage.tsx: Handles assessment flow, showing the form if not submitted, or access/duplicate submission messages based on identity and prior results.
frontend/src/pages/HomePage.tsx: Home page that checks authentication and submission status to show login prompt, start assessment, or link to results.
frontend/src/pages/ResultsPage.tsx: Displays a user's assessment results, handling authentication, loading, and missing data states.
frontend/src/pages/SurveyorDashboardPage: Admin-only dashboard listing all submissions with JSON/CSV export options and access checks.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility helpers for reading, storing, and clearing URL and session-based parameters.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration defining theme colors, animations, plugins, and container settings.
project_state.json: Project state metadata describing app features, requirements, architecture notes, and implemented functionality.
